summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOTTOLAB Financial Lifecycle Features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages for Agent Balances and Winning Tickets load correctly with proper navigation. All financial endpoints working: ticket check, payout, agent balance, company balances, winning tickets, payouts history, financial summary. Authorization properly restricts agent access to company-level endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: All financial endpoints properly require authentication
Agent-level endpoints correctly restricted from company-level data
Balance adjustment modal has proper validation (type, amount, reason)
Winning tickets page displays correct empty state when no winners
Demo accounts have been removed from login page
Financial summary endpoint supports today/week/month periods
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing accounts. Balance adjustment test was reverted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial lifecycle system fully tested. Agent balance starts at 50,000 HTG credit limit. When tickets are sold, available_balance decreases and current_balance increases. Ticket check endpoint validates against global_results. Payout endpoint requires WINNER status ticket. All company-level financial endpoints properly restricted to admins.

financial_endpoints.GET /api/agent/balance: PASS - Returns agent's balance with credit_limit, current_balance, available_balance, total_sales, total_payouts, total_winnings
financial_endpoints.GET /api/company/agent-balances: PASS - Returns list of all agent balances for company
financial_endpoints.PUT /api/company/agent-balances/{agent_i: PASS - Adjusts agent credit (CREDIT_ADD, CREDIT_REMOVE, BALANCE_RESET)
financial_endpoints.POST /api/tickets/check: PASS - Checks ticket status, returns 404 for non-existent tickets
financial_endpoints.POST /api/tickets/payout: PASS - Processes payout for winning tickets, returns 404 for non-existent tickets
financial_endpoints.GET /api/company/winning-tickets: PASS - Returns list of winning tickets (WINNER or PAID status)
financial_endpoints.GET /api/company/financial-summary?perio: PASS - Returns financial summary with tickets, sales, payouts, net_revenue

authorization_tests.unauthenticated_requests_rejected: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 without token

frontend_pages./company/agent-balances: PASS - Displays agent balances with summary cards, search, adjust modal
frontend_pages./company/winning-tickets: PASS - Displays winning tickets with tabs (Gagnants/Paiements), search, filters

login_page_changes.demo_accounts_removed: PASS - No demo accounts visible on login page
